arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid squad list to face WSG Tirol – four youth prospects named
arts.sum: Real Madrid will fly out to Austria for their pre-season friendly match against WSG Tirol set to take place tomorrow in Innsbruck. Having played a training match against Leganes at Valdebebas last week, this game will be the last friendly for Xabi Alonso’s men before the start of the 2025/26 La Liga season. arts.ttl: Just in – Real Madrid superstar out of WSG Tirol clash; teenager called up as replacement
arts.sum: With the new season only a week away, Real Madrid are working hard on their preparations for the opening fixture against Osasuna. However, things do not seem to be going as per plans for manager Xabi Alonso as he has had multiple fitness setbacks to deal with in midfield. arts.ttl: WSG Tirol vs Real Madrid Preview: Start Time, Team News, How To Watch & Live Stream
arts.sum: While there, they will face Austrian Bundesliga side WSG Tirol on August 12, their only pre-season friendly not behind closed doors. Last week, they faced La Liga 2 side Leganes in a behind-closed-doors friendly match, winning 4-1 thanks to goals from Brahim Diaz, Dean Huijsen, Eder Militao, and Thiago Pitarch.
